textByHashes.794976b87a11461a1fce47566f2ee644800d89c9: We were invited to a house party on an island not far from here... Something felt wrong about the whole thing but we went anyway...
textByHashes.e71dba34c39488b5b42780956abe3d9cace89b4c: The house seemed pretty creepy, but everything was going fine, we were all having a good time...
textByHashes.5daaa852294015ff324f95eb59c913f390e71078: Hewey bought me enough time to find an old boat. I went back to get him but it was too late. I'm scared that he won't make it.
textByHashes.dd5dbf8d52fb5136ca0744747819e23e1d4602bf: You have to do something... they can't get away with this!
textByHashes.65e17aa4613154d0f20949675b3e9cccaa801daf: That psycho is still out there, you have to bring them to justice.
textByHashes.f88d140ef59c1170ef0b3ee78257a861b7eeb82b: The boat we escaped on is just over there, you can use it to get to the island.
textByHashes.5f1b08af87522173a6b317e023d6204391e2d135: Please, you need to make sure they don't get away with this! You can use the boat over there to get to the island we escaped from.
textByHashes.6395ea10c5036c11c9c9f626ee91b96ac5266259: You just don't get it do you?
textByHashes.55a014182b85efc95e3a62f1519dc75a19231ecd: So big headed. So used to it all being about you. About you saving the day.
textByHashes.317f76b5a33424b7f96b130cfece033f53506aee: Adventurers! You're all the same. Everything always has to be about you.
textByHashes.d51c3b2f4c85cc8b4f37b25a77675ac6298fb2ad: Of course you wouldn't! Because you can't see past yourself!
textByHashes.9e5cb4f80d3972ac3172e706088d9494df390b1c: Believe it or not... I used to be like you.
textByHashes.9593e2390d2c17950e42ddb9e1c9abec9b47a5d2: I'd hear about some damsel in distress and go to help. To have my moment. For me to be the hero, just for once.
textByHashes.c2fba850ab0e061ef341b3232a2171cb009ba86b: But YOU! You and every other darned adventurer! Every time I get there to help, it's too late. Crisis solved. Disaster averted. Reward claimed. Every time you and those other adventurers steal my moment!
textByHashes.93812b144cbedad7fa7c58822531caa43e1227d4: This time, it is all about me! I'm the star of the show! ME ME ME ME ME!
textByHashes.778e345cae0379d2bfa8c0ff09eac951560085d1: Oh, but there is always a curtain call.
textByHashes.0f1e604eea26364cd254b46b588ce0d83d9fd0d1: Of course. Every good show needs a good supporting actor. Now, take off your mask darling. Take a bow. You have earned it.
textByHashes.a3d70360f2be23863b9f49f3b37f3ca8fa967a05: Perhaps not, but neither did I deserve to be cast back into the shadows when I deserve the spotlight!
textByHashes.3720dd573899003db6b71713023839d035d90080: And now I have my starring role!
textByHashes.a92ca6b4561da6af75f98cfee36642cd113f5195: Gielinor will forever remember this night and what I have done here.
textByHashes.bfba1a4abc4d706248a08e049e150c53476dc754: Quiet Hewey! This is my moment!
textByHashes.9715c0d71abe2b48ca0bf617796211b3b0997de6: Stop ruining this Hewey! I have worked so hard for this and I'm not going to let you take it away from me!
textByHashes.fa65ef9e88dd559ea48771065aec207fbd47fd4f: We were never equals! How could you possibly compare to me!?
textByHashes.58bc21790e14fe4044ad9d803cff151fe8802056: It wasn't supposed to be like this...but you just couldn't let me have my moment. WHY HEWEY WHY!? I loved you...
textByHashes.3bf5672f237b0cec968783c3fc2aba01833c9513: You dare try and ruin my moment!
textByHashes.af45e4d75f822ff9fc431fd1d9f5a7f2a3da3ef2: Hewey is dead because of you!
textByHashes.5e5756f03b0b9d44f4dcb299416ff3f2bb8dc0b4: Now it is time for you to join him!
